diagrams.title: GCP Core Services Overview
diagrams.description: A hierarchical diagram showing the main service categories offered by Google Cloud Platform, organized by function. This helps learners understand the breadth and organization of GCP's offerings.
diagrams.purpose: To provide a comprehensive overview of GCP service categories and help users understand where different services fit within the cloud computing landscape.

diagrams.title: GCP Global Network Infrastructure
diagrams.description: A world map visualization showing Google Cloud's global network of data centers and regions. Shows how GCP's private global network connects users worldwide with low latency.
diagrams.purpose: To explain GCP's global infrastructure advantage and how Google's private network provides low-latency connectivity across continents.

diagrams.title: Typical GCP Application Architecture
diagrams.description: A flow diagram showing how various GCP services work together in a typical cloud application - from user request to data storage. Demonstrates the integration of compute, storage, networking, and managed services.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate how to architect a real-world application on GCP using multiple services together, showing the modular and scalable nature of cloud-native design.
